title: エルコンドルパサー登場！

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No one knows...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No one knows my real face.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I'm weak. I'm a crybaby and a
chicken... But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ever since the day I put on this wrestling mask my
papa gave me...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I became the world's strongest racer—El Condor
Pasaaa!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Um, we all know who you are...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, my Trainee Umamusume and I begin our
Twinkle Series challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Except... she's not at the place we're supposed to
meet. What's going on?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! What're ya looking at, Trainer? Up here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The voice is coming from... a treetop?! It's—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! Bursting with talent! Possessing the soul
of a wrestler! Lover of all things spicy!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aiming for the top of the world, soaring past the
stars—it's your very own El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Mornin', Trainer! I'm looking good today, right?
choice_data_list: You aren't overdoing it, are you?
You aren't overdoing it, are you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: N-no way! I know you'll just yell at me if I do.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But the minute you say "go," there's gonna be no
stopping me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've got ambition higher than the Andes! La
número uno en el mundo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa. No doubt she has the potential
to one day be the world's strongest racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she still has a lot of room to grow, both
physically and mentally. You can't soar high as a
hatchling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to utilize her incredible sense of
motivation and positivity to help her grow.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I've hit the ceiling and crashed
every time I've started soaring.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But with you by my side, I know there's nothin' to
be afraid of anymore!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? Rivals?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Now that you mention it, there are a ton of
tough Umamusume in my class.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Take my roommate, Grass Wonder, for starters!
She's a prodigy with a blue flame burning at the
heart of her pure core!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Why thank you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And then there's la nube, Seiun Sky! Like a cloud,
she floats listlessly. But when push comes to
shove, she moves in like an assassin!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I really don't, but sure!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's not forget the alluring King Halo! With an
attitude loftier than the sky, she's a competitor
who takes the fight outside the ring with her
first-rate looks!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Alluring is right! What else do you expect of a
first-rate racer?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And last, but certainly not least, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...That's all I get?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
However, they aren't the ones whose name will
soon be known the world over! Who is she?! Who
could it be?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Trainer, I'm gonna ask you the same thing I
asked you back when we started this tag team.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The world's strongest racer—she flies across the
turf at light speed!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And her name is?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! And now, we take our first step
forward, spread our wings and take flight toward
the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a weak little girl anymore! With our
powers combined, let's take off and become the
world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's fly hella high! Higher than a condor! Higher
than the heavens!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa shouts into the sky.

text_block_list.name: Pigeon
text_block_list.text: Coo, coo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A condor takes flight overhead! ...Well, a pigeon
does.
